author: Anjali S.
text: Dr. Gulati is exceptional. He has been our family physician for over a decade. His diagnoses are always accurate, and he takes the time to explain everything clearly. Highly recommended for anyone in CR Park.

author: Rahul M.
text: Visited Dr. Swarajit Ghosh for acupuncture to treat chronic back pain. After just three sessions, the relief was immense. The clinic is very clean and the staff is highly professional.

author: Priya K.
text: Great clinic with experienced doctors. My ENT consultation went very smoothly and the prescribed medication worked perfectly. It can get a bit crowded during evening hours, so booking ahead is a must.

author: Vikram D.
text: One of the best neighborhood clinics. They genuinely care about preventive healthcare. I got my routine checkup done here and the detailed walkthrough of my health markers gave me immense peace of mind.

author: Sunita R.
text: I was suffering from severe migraines and the holistic treatment approach here, combining general medicine with targeted therapy, worked wonders. The ambiance is very reassuring.

author: Deepak C.
text: Very reliable doctors. We bring our elderly parents here for their regular checkups. Dr. Gulati is extremely patient and listens carefully before prescribing anything.
